title: Reduce CSV dataset from 2000 to 500 records

requirements.text: Regenerate the CSV dataset file at frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv with approximately 500 records instead of 2000, maintaining the existing schema with columns: Citizen_ID (12-digit text), Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount (number), Last_Claim_Date (DD-MM-YYYY format), Region_Code, Account_Status (Active/Inactive), Aadhaar_Linked (TRUE/FALSE), Claim_Count (number). Preserve data variety including different income tiers, multiple scheme types (Pension, Health, Education), various region codes, mix of Active/Inactive accounts, TRUE/FALSE Aadhaar linkage status, and claim counts ranging from 0 to 5.

quotes: give the data you use in csv file give approx of 500 data

acceptanceCriteria: CSV file contains approximately 500 records (acceptable range: 480-520 records)
All existing schema columns are preserved with correct data types
Data variety is maintained across all categorical fields
File remains downloadable from the same location in the application

constraints: Do not change the CSV file location or name (frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv)
Do not modify the existing schema structure or column names
Maintain the same data generation patterns as the original 2000-record dataset
nonGoals: Modifying the backend data model or import logic
Changing the UI components that reference or display the CSV data
Altering validation rules or processing logic that uses the dataset
